description:
Remove the need for human polling to drive delegated-worker orchestration. Scope:
- keep inspecting active/tracked workers in the parent session without requiring a new turn
- automatically run the same inspection/orchestration path used by `/bw workers`
- when session mode is `run`, continue epic orchestration cycles in the background so `/bw run` remains useful after the initial command returns
- surface notifications for landed/attention/completed states without duplicate spam
- stop background supervision cleanly on shutdown or when no workers remain

Goal: delegated-worker landing and `/bw run` should not require manual `/bw workers` babysitting.
title: Add background supervision for active beadwork workers and /bw run
